overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a cowboy character exploring a geothermal wilderness area with vibrant blue hot springs and an active geyser during golden hour morning light.

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward the distant geothermal pool and geyser

entered.detail: tall green and brown grass covering the ground
vibrant blue hot spring water surrounded by mineral crust
scattered evergreen trees on the horizon
steep rock face rising behind the geyser
active steam vent erupting white mist into the air

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast grassy meadow in morning light, approaching a geothermal area with a striking blue hot spring and an active geyser visible in the distance against a backdrop of pine trees and rocky cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal hot spring with mineral deposits

events.description: character reaches the rocky mineral terrain and begins circling clockwise around the hot spring pool

agents.ego_description: circling around the edge of the hot spring pool, observing the vibrant blue water and surrounding mineral crust

entered.detail: mineral-stained rocky ground surrounding the hot spring
colorful sulfuric mineral crust at the pool's edge

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from grass to rocky mineral terrain, circling the vibrant blue hot spring while the geyser steams prominently in the background. The ground shows colorful sulfuric deposits around the pool's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal pool with active geyser erupting

events.description: character slows to a stop at the pool's edge to observe the geyser eruption
geyser steam plume intensifies and drifts across the scene

agents.ego_description: standing at the edge of the hot spring, watching the geyser erupt and steam rise into the morning air

segments.scene_description: The character pauses at the pool's edge to observe the active geyser, which erupts with increasing intensity. Steam drifts across the rocky landscape as the camera pans to follow the geothermal activity.

events.description: character leaves the geothermal area and enters open grassland
camera turns to face the sun, creating lens flare and strong backlit conditions

agents.ego_description: walking away from the geothermal pool into the open grassland toward the sun

entered.detail: large scattered rocks in the grassy field
mountain range silhouetted against the bright sky

segments.scene_description: The character departs the geothermal area, walking through open grassland dotted with large boulders. The camera turns to face the sun, creating a strong backlit effect with lens flare as the geothermal features disappear behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene grassy meadow into a vibrant geothermal basin before heading back into the open wilderness. It begins with the character walking through vast grasslands in the morning light, approaching a distant blue hot spring and a steaming geyser set against rocky cliffs and pine trees. As the terrain shifts from grass to rocky mineral ground, the camera circles the vivid blue pool and its colorful sulfuric deposits while the geyser erupts with increasing intensity in the background. The scene then pauses at the water's edge to follow the drifting steam and geothermal activity before the character departs the basin. Finally, the camera moves back through grassland dotted with boulders and turns toward the sun, creating a strong backlit lens flare as the geothermal features fade into the distance.
